<!--
Thanks! A few things make review faster:
- Tie this back to an issue if one exists.
- Note behavioral changes explicitly — see CONTRIBUTING.md.
- Run `python -m pytest -q` and `ruff check src tests` locally.
-->

## What this changes

A line or two on the user-visible behaviour change, or "internal refactor — no behaviour change."

## Why

The motivation. A linked issue is enough if it has the context.

## Test plan

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q` passes
- [ ] `ruff check src tests` passes
- [ ] Manual: <what you tried, briefly>

## Notes for reviewers

Anything subtle, or any decision you made that you're not sure about.
